title: Corrective fix for B0031-docs: Document Implement TUI data model and panel formatting
description:
Blocked reason: The required linked spec file lives outside the writable worktree available to this bead, so I could not complete the documentation update end-to-end.

Remaining work: Mirror the same behavior notes into the linked spec at `specs/tui-operator-console-v1.md`, especially the implemented filter set (`default`, `actionable`, `deferred`, `done`, per-status), handoff/detail formatting fields, footer output, and the fact that the interactive `orchestrator tui` command is still pending.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0031-docs.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Created `specs/tui-operator-console-v1.md` documenting the current TUI helper layer: implemented filter modes (`default`, `all`, `actionable`, `deferred`, `done`, plus per-status filters), tree-row/data-model behavior, detail-panel fields, footer output, and the fact that the interactive `orchestrator tui` command is still pending. Verified the spec against `src/codex_orchestrator/tui.py`, `tests/test_orchestrator.py`, and the existing README changes already present in this worktree.
handoff_summary.remaining: No additional documentation work is required for this corrective bead. Parent bead can be retried using the new spec file now present under `specs/`.
handoff_summary.risks: README was already modified in this shared worktree before this run; I left that existing change intact and only added the missing spec file. Future runtime changes to filter constants or detail/footer helpers must keep README and this spec synchronized to avoid drift.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry the parent documentation bead or continue normal review flow now that the linked spec exists in the writable worktree.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Downstream TUI/runtime work should continue to reuse the shared filter constants and footer/detail formatting helpers; otherwise README/spec text and actual TUI output can drift again.

conflict_risks: Downstream TUI/runtime work should continue to reuse the shared filter constants and footer/detail formatting helpers; otherwise README/spec text and actual TUI output can drift again.

execution_history.summary: Added the missing TUI operator console spec so the linked documentation now matches the implemented helper-layer behavior already described in README.

guardrails.template_text:
# Documentation Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Update documentation and examples that explain the assigned behavior without changing runtime feature behavior.

Allowed actions:
- Edit docs, examples, and explanatory text tied to the assigned bead.
- Align documentation with existing code and validated behavior.
- Identify when implementation or tests must land first and block with a handoff.

Disallowed actions:
- Change runtime behavior, production code paths, or feature logic.
- Invent undocumented behavior that is not present in the codebase.
- Approve code quality or test completeness as a substitute for review.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise documentation changes and remaining gaps.
- Accurate updated docs and clear next-agent recommendations when code changes are required first.
